title: Ability to edit pre-existing automation recipe templates
excerpt: Currently some pre-existing automation templates are useful but very limited, as I cannot use them outside of the given template (because they’re not editable and therefore cannot be combined to create more complex recip…

posts.author: Dly215 (Duong )
posts.cookedHtml: Currently some pre-existing automation templates are useful but very limited, as I cannot use them outside of the given template (because they’re not editable and therefore cannot be combined to create more complex recipes). Please allow them to be edited like regular recipes.

posts.author: vrvora (Viral Vora)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree with Duong. This functionality is much needed and a big value add.

posts.author: Doradocsvs (Jennifer Raynow)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree, this is something I need as well. For example, I have this automation set in my account from the premade templates:
When Button (Schedule Survey) clicked, create Activity of Type (Survey)

I would like to add a condition for the button to only trigger the action if the date column has been filled out.

This is just one of many automation templates I would like to have editing access to. Hopefully out ability to edit them becomes available soon!
